Insight from data, built with care

I'm a Data Analyst and Power BI Developer based in Mumbai. I work with large datasets — cleaning, transforming and modelling them with Python, SQL and Advanced Excel — to build interactive dashboards that help teams make better decisions.

My background spans data science, BI development and a stint in software & web, so I bring both the analytical and the practical side to every project. Outside work, you'll find me at the gym.

Graduate in Computer Applications (BCA) from MGM University.
